strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB across multiple roles
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Proven track record of optimizing performance and scalability in high-traffic systems
concerns: Limited recent experience with Nest.js, a primary stack requirement
No clear evidence of working with Vitest, another required testing framework
Gap in employment history (October 2025–Present) with no explanation
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack skills and experience with AI-agent infrastructure, aligning well with senior full-stack roles. However, his lack of recent experience with Nest.js and Vitest, along with a current employment gap, introduces concerns about immediate technical fit and availability.
